name: Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc.
business: Praxis Precision Medicines is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing therapies for CNS disorders. It has no approved products and has not generated any revenue. The company focuses on translating genetic insights into treatments for neurological conditions characterized by neuronal excitation-inhibition imbalance.
sellsTo: Patients with essential tremor, developmental and epileptic encephalopathies, focal onset seizures, generalized epilepsy

exposures.sentence: we are a fully integrated, leading central nervous system, or CNS, precision neuroscience biopharmaceutical company translating insights from genetic epilepsies into the development of therapies for CNS disorders characterized by neuronal excitation-inhibition imbalance.

Cerebrum, our small molecule platform, utilizes deep understanding of neuronal excitability and neuronal networks and applies a series of computational and experimental tools to develop orally available precision therapies
Solidus, our antisense oligonucleotide, or ASO, platform, is an efficient, targeted precision medicine discovery and development engine anchored on a proprietary, computational methodology

catalysts.event: Topline results from POWER1 study (vormatrigine in focal onset seizures)
catalysts.sentence: For our POWER1 study, a double-blind, placebo-controlled, 12-week study in focal onset seizures, we expect to announce topline results in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results from EMBRAVE Part A study (elsunersen)
catalysts.sentence: For our most advanced product candidate under the Solidus platform, elsunersen, we expect to announce topline results for the EMBRAVE Part A study evaluating the safety and efficacy of elsunersen versus sham procedure in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results from EMBRAVE3 pivotal study (elsunersen)
catalysts.sentence: We are currently enrolling EMBRAVE3, a Phase 3 registrational study for SCN2A gain-of-function DEE, and expect to announce topline results in 2027.

catalysts.event: Full enrollment of EMERALD study (relutrigine in broad DEEs)
catalysts.sentence: The EMERALD study, which is evaluating relutrigine in patients with broad DEEs, is ongoing and we expect to be fully enrolled in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Nomination of development candidates for PRAX-080, PRAX-090, PRAX-100
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate nominating a development candidate for PRAX-080, PRAX-090 and PRAX-100 in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initiation of POWER3 clinical trial (vormatrigine monotherapy)
catalysts.sentence: We intend to initiate POWER3, a clinical trial evaluating vormatrigine as a single-agent treatment for focal onset seizures, in the first half of 2026.
